results.rendered_html:
avyāja a. Free from guile or fraud.
— jaḥ, -jaṃ
1 Absence of guile or fraud, honesty.
2 Simplicity, artlessness; oft. in comp. with suṃdara, manohara &c. in the sense of ‘artlessly’, ‘naturally’; idaṃ kilāvyājamanoharaṃ vapuḥ  Ś. 1. 18 ;  M. 2. 14 ; ˚ramaṇīyaṃ prema  K. 175.
